assignment.reviewer: {paired reviewer name from your CYCLE_WORKERS payload}

freshness.source_artifacts: {comma-separated artifact paths consulted for this scope}

assignment.commands: {build, test, lint commands — from AGENTS.md or project config. The builder uses these to verify its work.}

scope.what: {behavior and objectives — not file-by-file changes. Describe what to build, not how.}
scope.why: {which acceptance criteria / milestone goals this satisfies}

context.existing: {curated interfaces the builder must match — type signatures, function signatures. No full file dumps. Keep under 20 lines.}
context.design: {ONLY when design_enabled. JIT component brief: relevant token subset, interaction states, design constraints. Omit if no UI components.}

assignment.test_requirements: {what behaviors to test — not how to test them}
